title: stenogyne earina
intro: Stenogyne earina, also known as Hawaiian Mountain Lantana, is a flowering plant native to the islands of Hawaii. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Stenogyne earina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
